faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Concise answers to the most common questions about the Raqeem platform.

q1.question: What kinds of institutions does Raqeem serve?
q1.answer: Raqeem serves schools, institutes, tutoring centers, and language centers, whether a single institution or a network of branches.

q2.question: Do teachers and parents need long training?
q2.answer: No. The interfaces are designed to be simple and direct, and each role only sees the tools it needs daily.

q3.question: Does Raqeem work on mobile?
q3.answer: Yes. Raqeem works on the web and through a mobile app, with the same data and the same permissions.

q4.question: How is the institution's data protected?
q4.answer: Each institution's data is fully isolated, and permissions are enforced on the server, so every user only sees what belongs to their role and scope.

q5.question: Does Raqeem support multiple languages?
q5.answer: Yes. The interface is available in Arabic, French, English, and Spanish, with full support for both writing directions.

q6.question: Can several branches be managed from one account?
q6.answer: Yes. Raqeem supports institution groups with multiple branches, with a general director for the network and an independent director for each institution.

q7.question: How do I get started with Raqeem?
q7.answer: Fill in the demo request form and our team will contact you to arrange a live demo suited to your institution.

q8.question: Can the timetable be reviewed before it is published?
q8.answer: Yes. The timetable is built as a draft, conflicts are detected and the version is reviewed, then it is published in an organized way for everyone.

timetablePage.title: The timetable in Raqeem
timetablePage.intro: A complete system for building and reviewing the timetable before publishing — not just a grid.
timetablePage.setupText: Define working days, closed days and half days, plus study hours and breaks to match your institution.
timetablePage.buildText: Link every session to a teacher, a class, and a room, and work on a draft that nobody sees until it is ready.
timetablePage.validateText: Raqeem detects teacher, class, and room conflicts before publishing, so mistakes never reach your users.
timetablePage.publishText: After review, the timetable is published for everyone: day and week views, plus the current and next session for each user.

securityPage.title: Security and permissions in Raqeem
securityPage.intro: One principle governs the platform: every user sees only what concerns them, and enforcement always happens on the server.
securityPage.rolesText: Every role in Raqeem — administration, teacher, parent, student — has precisely defined permissions. Parents see only their children, teachers only their classes, and students only their own data.
securityPage.isolationText: Each institution's data is fully isolated from the others. In branch networks, permissions are defined per institution, with precise administrative scopes inside each one.
securityPage.attachmentsText: Resources and attachments are protected by the same permission rules, so only those entitled to them can access them.
securityPage.serverText: Every request is verified on the server before it is executed. The interface does not decide permissions — it only reflects them.

about.title: About Raqeem
about.intro: Raqeem is a complete digital platform for managing educational institutions, bringing administration, teachers, parents, and students together in one ecosystem.
about.missionText: We believe an educational institution's time should be spent on teaching, not paperwork. So we build tools that simplify daily operations and connect every member of the educational community through a clear, reliable experience.
about.visionText: The right information, available to the right person at the right time, in every educational institution, whatever its size.

1.title: Clarity
1.text: Simple interfaces and understandable language for every role.

2.title: Reliability
2.text: Accurate data and permissions that are always respected.

3.title: Privacy
3.text: Institution and family data is a responsibility we take seriously.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: This policy explains how the Raqeem website handles the data you provide through its forms. It applies to this marketing site; the Raqeem platform itself is governed by separate agreements with institutions.

collection.title: The data we collect
collection.text: When you submit a demo request or a contact message, we collect only the data you enter: the institution's name and type, contact details, and the content of your message.

use.title: How we use the data
use.text: We use this data to answer your request, arrange the demo, and communicate with you about Raqeem. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties for marketing.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.text: We keep request data for as long as needed to process and follow up on it, then delete or anonymize it.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.text: If analytics is enabled, we only measure page visits and general interactions, without transmitting message contents, phone numbers, email addresses, or institution names.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You can request access to your data, its correction, or its deletion at any time by reaching out through the Contact page.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: These terms govern your use of the Raqeem marketing website. By using the site, you agree to these terms.

site.title: Use of the site
site.text: This site presents the Raqeem platform and offers contact and demo request forms. The forms must be used with accurate information and for legitimate purposes only.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.text: The Raqeem name, its logo, and all site content belong to their owners. The logo may not be reused, modified, or redrawn without written permission.

platform.title: The Raqeem platform
platform.text: Use of the Raqeem platform itself is governed by separate agreements with educational institutions; these terms create no right to use the platform.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.text: We strive to keep the site's content accurate and up to date, without guaranteeing it is entirely error-free. We accept no liability for indirect damages resulting from use of the site.

changes.title: Changes to the terms
changes.text: We may update these terms from time to time; continued use of the site after an update constitutes acceptance of the new version.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

errorPage.title: An unexpected error occurred
errorPage.description: We apologize for the inconvenience. You can try again.
